title: Cannot execute binary existing in container: bash: ./uf_sms: No such file or directory
body:
**Description**

I can build a container with buildah. I can put my golang binary in it and install bash. I can view the binary inside of the container. However, I cannot execute it. I can execute bash.

setup:
rootless
Void Linux kernel 5.18.11_1 
systemd-less

**Steps to reproduce the issue:**
My build script:
```
#!/bin/sh

con=uf_sms
app=$con
go build -o $app

buildah rm $con
buildah rmi $con
temp=`buildah from mirror.gcr.io/library/alpine`
buildah rename $temp $con

buildah run $con -- apk upgrade
buildah run $con -- apk add bash

buildah config --workingdir /root $con
buildah copy $app $app

buildah config --annotation $app $con
buildah config --label name=$con $con

buildah config --entrypoint "/root/$app" $con

buildah commit $con $con
```

**Describe the results you received:**

Case 1: podman cannot find uf_sms

```
supper@voidx17 ~ $ podman run --rm localhost/uf_sms
/bin/sh: line 0: /root/uf_sms: not found
```

Case 2: bash cannot find uf_sms (TAB autocomplete works lol)

```
supper@voidx17 ~ $ buildah run uf_sms bash
bash-5.1# pwd
/root
bash-5.1# whoami
root
bash-5.1# ls -lah
total 11M    
drwx------    1 root     root        4.0K Aug  4 23:35 .
dr-xr-xr-x    1 root     root        4.0K Aug  4 23:35 ..
-rwxr-xr-x    1 root     root       10.6M Aug  4 23:35 uf_sms
bash-5.1# ./uf_sms 
bash: ./uf_sms: No such file or directory
```

**Describe the results you expected:**


**Output of `rpm -q buildah` or `apt list buildah`:**

```
supper@voidx17 ~ $ xbps-query -Rs buildah
[*] buildah-1.24.3_1         Dockerfile compatible OCI image building tool
[*] containers.image-5.0.0_1 Configuration shared by podman, buildah, and skopeo
```

**Output of `buildah version`:**

```
buildah version 1.24.3 (image-spec 1.0.2-dev, runtime-spec 1.0.2-dev)
```

**Output of `podman version` if reporting a `podman build` issue:**

```
Client:       Podman Engine
Version:      4.1.0
API Version:  4.1.0
Go Version:   go1.18.1
Built:        Wed Dec 31 19:00:00 1969
OS/Arch:      linux/amd64
```

**Output of `cat /etc/*release`:**

```
n/a
```

**Output of `uname -a`:**

```
Linux voidx17 5.18.11_1 #1 SMP PREEMPT_DYNAMIC Wed Jul 13 17:27:44 UTC 2022 x86_64 GNU/L
```

**Output of `cat /etc/containers/storage.conf`:**

```
driver = "overlay"
runroot = "/run/containers/storage"
graphroot = "/var/lib/containers/storage"
rootless_storage_path = "$HOME/.local/share/containers/storage"
additionalimagestores = [
]
pull_options = {enable_partial_images = "false", use_hard_links = "false", ostree_repos=""}
[storage.options.overlay]
mountopt = "nodev"

```

comments.body:
Ah, I forgot about static linking the go binary when I compile it. 

`go build -ldflags '-linkmode external -w -extldflags "-static"' -o uf_sms`

or

`CGO_ENABLED=0 go build -o uf_sms`
